mnemonics.title: Three Schema Levels
mnemonics.content: E.C.I. (External, Conceptual, Internal) - Like 'Easy Computer Interface'

acronyms.usage: Refers to ANSI/SPARC three-level architecture standard

visualTips.visualization: Imagine 3 stacked layers: User View (top), Logic (middle), Storage (bottom)

analogies.analogy: Like a building blueprint vs actual construction (schema vs instance)
